97501001.name: Great Witch's Curse
97501001.desc:
Gain [WitchFactor] when meeting one of the following conditions:
- On hit: gain 3 Stack
- On kill: gain 10 Stack
- When this unit's SP decreases: gain 1 Stack for each SP lost
- When [Rewind] or [RewindWitch] is consumed after preventing fatal damage: gain 20 Stack for each Stack consumed

When meeting one of the following conditions, gain [Witchization] (once per encounter):
- This unit has -20 or less SP
- This unit has 50+ [WitchFactor]

The first time this unit gains [Witchization]:
- If SP is above -20, set SP to -20 (does not gain [WitchFactor] due to this effect)
- Remove all Stagger thresholds and recover from Stagger
- Convert all [Rewind] into [RewindWitch]
- Gain [RitualSword]

While this unit has [Witchization], use Negative Coin Skills as base Skills. Otherwise, use Positive Coin Skills as base Skills

97501002.name: Death Rewind
97501002.flavor: Let me meet them once more. That is my only wish.

97501003.name: Court of Judgment
97501003.desc:
At encounter start, the leftmost Slot on the Dashboard gains 10 Aggro
Can redirect attacks toward units with [Rebuttal] regardless of Speed (Focused encounters only)
When Clashing against units with [Rebuttal], Clash Power +2
Damage taken from units with [Rebuttal] +20%
97501003.flavor: "Everyone, take out your phones and vote for the most suspicious suspect... And now, the witch trial is in session!"

97501004.name: I Return to Today With Every Answer
97501004.desc:
Gain [Repose] when meeting one of the following conditions:
- current count: +1 for each ally with [Witchization], and +1 for each enemy
- accumulated count: gain 1 Stack for each Corroding ally, and when an ally uses E.G.O Corrosion Skills, gain 1 Stack

At 13 [Repose], and this unit is not Corroding:
- replace the leftmost Base Skill on the Dashboard with "Witch Repose Ritual"

While this unit has [Witchization], if its SP is -35 or lower:
- replace the leftmost Base Skill on the Dashboard with "This Is Only to Grant You Deliverance"
- If this unit is Corroding, replace the Skill at the start of the next turn instead
97501004.flavor: No matter how it ends, I must uphold what is right.

97501005.name: I'm Afraid I Can Never Go Back
97501005.desc:
If this unit has [Witchization] and does not have [RewindWitch]:
- At turn start, allies other than this unit lose 10 SP
- At turn start, allies with less than 0 SP, including this unit, gain 1 [Protection] and 1 [AttackDmgUp]

97501006.name: Exterminate Evil
97501006.desc: When the ally with the lowest SP Clashes against an Abnormality or an enemy with less than 0 SP, that ally gains Clash Power +1 and deals +10% damage
